items.headline: Deere (DE) Stock After Tariff Cuts Weighing An 11.6% Undervaluation Story
items.summary: Recent federal tariff cuts on imported agricultural and construction equipment have sharpened the focus on Deere (DE), as lower duties and a sizeable refund reshape its cost base and potential pricing power in key markets. See our latest analysis for Deere. The recent tariff cut news arrived after a soft patch, with the stock down about 3% over the past month and 7 days. That sits against a stronger 21.8% year to date share price return and an 84.9% five year total shareholder return,...
